ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address from which the transaction is initiated */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address to which the transaction is directed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount being transferred in wei */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of the call associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., transfer, contract) */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee in wei */,
  "gas_price" TEXT /* Gas price for the transaction */,
  "gas_limit" TEXT /* Gas limit for the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was included in a block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_call_type FOREIGN KEY ("call_type") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_address FOREIGN KEY ("from_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency wallet address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type (e.g., transfer, contract_call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Reference to the related transaction */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., transfer, contract) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address associated with the user */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the address in wei */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate to a standard currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., Ξ, ₿) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "miner" TEXT /* Miner who created the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Reference to the related transaction */,
  "gas_used" TEXT /* Gas used by the transaction */,
  "cumulative_gas_used" TEXT /* Cumulative gas used by the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_receipts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
